articles.title: SWITZERLAND'S NEW PASSPORT IS SO STUNNING, IT BELONGS IN A MUSEUM
articles.summary: Geneva-based RETINAA designed Switzerland's new passport, which blends security with artistry. Its pages feature 3D reliefs, custom typefaces, and UV-reactive elements, mapping the country's landscapes. A hydrological theme highlights Switzerland's water resources, while advanced printing techniques ensure security. This meticulous design reaffirms Switzerland's legacy of precision and innovation.

articles.title: GOOGLE ENHANCED GMAIL'S SEARCH WITH THE USE OF AI
FAREWELL PHOTOSHOP? GOOGLE'S NEW AI LETS YOU EDIT IMAGES BY ASKING
articles.summary: Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash now generates and edits images within chatbot conversations. It integrates text and image processing in one model, enabling object additions, removals, lighting changes, and more. While imperfect, it represents a step toward seamless AI-driven image manipulation, raising creative possibilities and ethical concerns about deepfakes.

articles.title: THE REAL PROBLEM WITH RESEARCH
articles.summary: Overemphasizing research in UX/UI design can shift responsibility to users and lead to unoriginal solutions. Designers should prioritize critical thinking, context, and bold decision-making rather than relying solely on research.

articles.title: DESIGN FOR A SMALL PLANET
articles.summary: UX design is facing cost pressures, much like past shifts toward sustainability. Teams need to ditch heavy processes for a simpler, collaborative approach. The GIST checklist—Gather, Impact, Sketch, and Team Huddle—helps streamline decisions, boosting clarity, teamwork, and outcomes while staying aligned with business needs.

articles.title: BRINGING SECURITY TO DIGITAL PRODUCT DESIGN
articles.summary: Security in digital product development often takes a backseat, leading to costly vulnerabilities. Shifting security discussions left—during design and analysis—can reduce remediation time by 50%. Techniques like hostile persona mapping and attacker action integration in user journeys help teams anticipate threats.

articles.title: ALL-IN-ONE AI IMAGE AND VIDEO GENERATOR
articles.summary: Pollo AI is an ultimate, all-in-one AI video and image generator that allows you to easily create stunning videos and images from various inputs.

articles.title: TAILWIND GRADIENT GENERATOR
articles.summary: Easily create stunning gradients with Tailwind CSS and customize them with direction and opacity, then instantly generate the corresponding Tailwind utility classes.

articles.title: MATCH COLORS FROM ANY IMAGE
articles.summary: Upload a source photo and watch Polarr Next AI transfer its look to your image.

articles.title: DISCOVERABILITY OF AI FEATURES: LEARN FROM AMAZON'S MISTAKES
articles.summary: AI features must be easily discoverable to succeed, as poor design and mismatched user expectations can cause them to go unnoticed. A study of Amazon's AI tools, including Rufus chat and AI-powered search suggestions, showed that even valuable features fail if users don't recognize them.

articles.title: IOS 18.4: FOUR NEW FEATURES COMING TO YOUR IPHONE NEXT MONTH
articles.summary: The iOS 18.4 update, launching in April, will introduce Priority Notifications, Ambient Music, seven new emojis, and Apple News+ Food for curated recipes. These features aim to improve iPhone users' organization, entertainment, and utility.

articles.title: THE MOST INNOVATIVE DESIGN COMPANIES OF 2025
articles.summary: Design is evolving with AI tools, Gen Z aesthetics, and innovations like sustainable A/C and exoskeletons. The most innovative design companies of 2025 push product, architecture, and UX boundaries. On's Lightspray tech advances sneaker sustainability, SharkNinja reinvents home appliances, JKR rebrands boldly, and Foster + Partners revitalizes urban spaces with modernized icons.

articles.title: THE OLD TWITTER BIRD SIGN JUST SOLD FOR $34,000
articles.summary: Twitter's old bird logo, “Larry,” sold at auction for $34,325, falling short of its $40,000 estimate.

articles.title: WHY HUMAN-CENTERED DESIGN IS CRITICAL TO FEDERAL DIGITAL SERVICES
articles.summary: The U.S. government is modernizing digital services through legislation like IDEA and GSDIA.

articles.title: MARIO AND ZELDA CREATOR REJECTS AI TO "FIND WHAT MAKES NINTENDO SPECIAL" – WHAT WE CAN ALL LEARN FROM SHIGERU MIYAMOTO
articles.summary: Nintendo rejects AI in game development, prioritizing creativity and originality.
